subject: update on acquisition and integration of mg plc

emails.subject: Update on Acquisition and Integration of MG plc
emails.subject_base: Update on Acquisition and Integration of MG plc
emails.body: Plenty to do. They should definitely be on SAP sooner rather than later. Also, I think we should agree on a game plan for reviewing trading controls ASAP. Alot of offices out there. Thanks. Forwarded by Richard Causey/Corp/Enron on 06/16/2000 02:28 PM Enron Europe From: Enron Europe General Announcement ECT 06/16/2000 11:54 AM

emails.subject: Re: Update on Acquisition and Integration of MG plc
emails.subject_base: Update on Acquisition and Integration of MG plc
emails.body: This is by way of a high level update on our approach. I can elaborate when we meet this week. Regards Fernley Richard Sage 26/06/2000 10:53
